mapper.select: SELECT * FROM kodik_episode_variant WHERE content_id = #{contentId} ORDER BY season_number, episode_number, translation_id
SELECT * FROM kodik_episode_variant WHERE content_id = #{contentId} AND mp4_link IS NULL ORDER BY season_number, episode_number
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kodik_episode_variant (content_id, season_number, episode_number, translation_id, translation_title, translation_type, quality, kodik_link, mp4_link) VALUES (#{contentId}, #{seasonNumber}, #{episodeNumber}, #{translationId}, #{translationTitle}, #{translationType}, #{quality}, #{kodikLink}, #{mp4Link})

INSERT INTO kodik_episode_variant (content_id, season_number, episode_number, translation_id, translation_title, translation_type, quality, kodik_link, mp4_link) VALUES (#{contentId}, #{seasonNumber}, #{episodeNumber}, #{translationId}, #{translationTitle}, #{translationType}, #{quality}, #{kodikLink}, #{mp4Link}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE translation_title = VALUES(translation_title), translation_type = VALUES(translation_type), quality = VALUES(quality), kodik_link = VALUES(kodik_link), mp4_link = COALESCE(VALUES(mp4_link), mp4_link)

insert.foreach: INSERT INTO kodik_episode_variant (content_id, season_number, episode_number, translation_id, translation_title, translation_type, quality, kodik_link, mp4_link) VALUES (#{v.contentId}, #{v.seasonNumber}, #{v.episodeNumber}, #{v.translationId}, #{v.translationTitle}, #{v.translationType}, #{v.quality}, #{v.kodikLink}, #{v.mp4Link}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE translation_title = VALUES(translation_title), translation_type = VALUES(translation_type), quality = VALUES(quality), kodik_link = VALUES(kodik_link), mp4_link = COALESCE(VALUES(mp4_link), mp4_link)

mapper.select: SELECT * FROM kodik_episode_variant WHERE mp4_link IS NOT NULL AND mp4_link_decoded_at IS NOT NULL AND mp4_link_decoded_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{hoursThreshold} HOUR) ORDER BY mp4_link_decoded_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM kodik_episode_variant WHERE mp4_link IS NULL AND kodik_link IS NOT NULL ORDER BY updated_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM kodik_episode_variant WHERE local_filepath IS NOT NULL ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
